execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut out = ""
mut first = true
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
mut in_tok = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if is_ws(b)
    if in_tok
      let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
      if first
        out = "#{tok} #{tok}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{tok} #{tok}"
      end
      in_tok = false
    end
  else
    if not in_tok
      start = i
      in_tok = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_tok
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
  if first
    out = "#{tok} #{tok}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{tok} #{tok}"
  end
end

println(out)
